events.name: Cleveland Cavaliers at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 34 points, reserve Jordan Clarkson had 25 and the New York Knicks came from 17 down in the fourth quarter to beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 126-124 on Thursday and win on Christmas Day for the third straight year.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brunson and the reserves lead a Christmas comeback as the Knicks beat the Cavaliers 126-124

video.headline: Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers
highlights.description: The Knicks erase a 17-point fourth-quarter deficit to take down the Cavaliers to open up the Christmas Day slate.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Knicks come from behind to beat Cavaliers) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — De'Aaron Fox scored 29 points, and the San Antonio Spurs defeated the Oklahoma City Thunder 117-102 on Thursday for their third win over the defending NBA champs in the past two weeks.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs beat Thunder 117-102 for 3rd win over defending NBA champs in 2 weeks

video.headline: Spurs beat Thunder for third straight time

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Spurs beat Thunder for third straight time) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Spurs beat Thunder for third straight time
highlights.description: Spurs impress again vs. the Thunder as they take down the defending champs on the road.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Spurs beat Thunder for third straight time) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

events.name: Dallas Mavericks at Golden State Warriors

headlines.description: — Stephen Curry scored 23 points and knocked down a key 3-pointer with 3:45 left to help seal it, Jimmy Butler added 14 points, nine assists and nine rebounds, and the Golden State Warriors beat the Dallas Mavericks 126-116 on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stephen Curry, Jimmy Butler lead the way as Warriors beat Mavericks 126-116 on Christmas Day

video.headline: Warriors cruise past Mavs on Christmas Day

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Warriors cruise past Mavs on Christmas Day) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Warriors cruise past Mavs on Christmas Day
highlights.description: The Warriors win their third straight game with a victory over the Mavericks on Christmas.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Warriors cruise past Mavs on Christmas Day) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

events.name: Houston Rockets at Los Angeles Lakers

headlines.description: — Amen Thompson scored 26 points to lead six players in double figures and the Houston Rockets never trailed in beating Luka Doncic and the Los Angeles Lakers 117-96 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Amen Thompson's 26 points lead Rockets to 119-96 win over Doncic and the Lakers

video.headline: Houston Rockets vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

headlines.description: — Nikola Jokic recorded a 56-point triple-double and set an NBA record with 18 points in overtime, leading the Denver Nuggets to a 142-138 win over the Minnesota Timberwolves on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jokic's 56-point triple-double powers Nuggets past Timberwolves in OT

video.headline: Nuggets outlast Timberwolves in OT thriller
